---
ID: SLD-FE-500
Title: PPTX Export UX (Single and Multi-Slide)
Status: Backlog
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-25
---

As a slide editor user
I want to export one or multiple slides to PPTX from the module
So I can deliver editable decks without leaving the slides workflow

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Import workspace supports single-slide PPTX export for the active slide.
- [ ] My Slides supports multi-select export controls with clear selected-count state.
- [ ] Export flow surfaces warnings report for unsupported component mappings.
- [ ] Success/failure states are actionable and write audit events for PPTX exports.
- [ ] Chat command coverage includes PPTX export initiation without dead-end follow-up.
